claim_layer: L2/L3 functional-slot / notation-structure only; no value/semantic claim; no licence touched (Art. XV)

cross_check_C_nongating.reading: fractions attach to quantity positions (after numerals or directly after single-sign logogram-like words); with no validated unit-slot candidate class, no unit-slot mediation is demonstrable

posthoc_nonverdict.PH_A1_oracle_rule_table: no rule exceeds F1 .262 within KN (best R6 .2621 KN-test) while the same rules reach .53-.67 nonKN (R6 .6653); selection is not the failure - the geometry itself has no within-KN power

PH_A2_class_prior_unmasking.reading: U share of the single-sign+numeral-followed slot: KN 14%, nonKN 47%. The apparent E007 'live U channel' (recall .862) is largely a CLASS-PRIOR effect at unit-heavy sites, not discriminative geometry: precision tracks base rate at every site

PH_B1_lb_arithmetic_surface.reading: LB totals are multi-denomination (GRA n T m V k); exact integer sum-consistency is structurally absent - LB is the WRONG calibration analogue for integer-sum totals logic; machinery itself proven by PC_B = 1.0

PH_LA1_exploratory_totals_readout.reading: EXPLORATORY ONLY (gate closed, no constraint emitted): the identical blind sum logic concentrates on KU-RO in LA (7/13 candidates vs 3.3% chance) - the arithmetic-totals channel plainly exists in LA but this epoch's LB-gated design cannot license it (Art. XII: KU-RO role is prior knowledge; recovery here is a detector-sanity signal, not a discovery)

posthoc_nonverdict.PH_LA2_exploratory_unitslot_readout: frozen R4 / oracle R6 on LA flag *21M (4 hits, 3 sites), SU (4, 3 sites), NA (3, 3 sites), DU, *22M, *131B etc.; given PH_A2 these flags mean 'single sign before numeral' (logogram-class prior), NOT a validated metrogram class - listed only as exploratory

verdicts.reason: frozen conjunctive LB fire criteria not met (A: within-site KN-test F1 .253 < .60; B: precision .0526 < .30, recall .0125 < .10); both PCs passed, so these are power/analogue negatives, not machinery failures
